document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Beaver Bank, Hammonds Plains and Upper Sackville

provisions.text: CD-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS In any CD-2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Lot Area 3,716 square metres (40,000 square feet) central services 11,148 square metres (120,000 square feet) on -site services Minimum Frontage 15 metres (49.2 feet) central services

metres (98.4 feet) on-site services Minimum Front Yard 30 metres (98.4 feet) Minimum Side Yard 30 metres (98.4 feet) Minimum Rear Yard 30 metres (98.4 feet) Maximum Lot Coverage 50 % Maximum Height 11 metres (36.0 feet)

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: OTHER REQUIREMENTS: C&D Materials Transfer Stations

provisions.text: OTHER REQUIREMENTS: C&D Materials Transfer Stations In any CD -2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued for any C&D Materials Transfer Stations except in conformity with the provision for such a use as contained within the CD-1 Zone.

GENERAL REQUIREMENTS: SITE PLAN APPROVAL C&D Materials Operations are subject to approval of a site plan. The Development Officer shall approve a site plan for each use which deals with those matters outlined in Section 26A.5.

content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in any CD-2 (C&D Recycling) Zone except for

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: the following, pursuant to the Site Plan Approval process:
content_blocks.text: Construction and Demolition Materials Processing Facilities All CD-1 Zone uses Uses Accessory to permitted uses, excluding construction and demolition disposal Accessory dwelling unit which are provided for the purpo ses of safety, security, or maintenance
In any CD-2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with

Minimum Lot Area 3,716 square metres (40,000 square feet) central services 11,148 square metres (120,000 square feet) on -site services Minimum Frontage 15 metres (49.2 feet) central services 30 metres (98.4 feet) on-site services Minimum Front Yard 30 metres (98.4 feet) Minimum Side Yard 30 metres (98.4 feet) Minimum Rear Yard 30 metres (98.4 feet) Maximum Lot Coverage 50 % Maximum Height 11 metres (36.0 feet) 26B.3 OTHER REQUIREMENTS: C&D Materials Transfer Stations In any CD -2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued for any C&D Materials Transfer Stations except in conformity with the provision for such a use as contained within the CD-1 Zone. 26B.4 OTHER REQUIREMENTS: C&D Materials Processing Facilities No development permit shall be issued for C&D materials processing facility except

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: in compliance with the following provisions:
content_blocks.text: (a) any building, structure or area used for processing shall meet the following

(i) from any property line 60 metres (196.8 feet) (ii) from the nearest residential dwelling or institutional use 90 metres (295.3 feet) (iii) from a watercourse 60 metres (196.8 feet) (b) notwithstanding Section 26B.4(a), where a building or structure is not to be located within 250 metres of a residential or institutional use or building, the building setback from any property line may be reduced to 10 metres (32.8 feet). (a) notwithstanding Section 26B.4(a), any C&D Materials Processing Facility which is to be totally enclosed within a building (no outdoor storage of material, product, processing area, or equipment) setback from any property line may be reduced to 10 metres (32.8 feet).
No development permit shall be issued for a C&D Materials Operation except in

(a) the operation complies with the general zone requirements as outlined in Section 26A.4. (b) notwithstanding Sections 26B.2 to 26B.4, inclusive, more than one C&D Materials operation is permitted on a site and each use shall be subject to the applicable standards unless the uses are not clearly differentiated than the more stringent requirements shall apply to the permitted uses.
C&D Materials Operations are subject to approval of a site plan. The Development Officer shall approve a site plan for each use which deals with those matters outlined in Section 26A.5.

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
